column1: # Title: Population-weighted HDDCDD historical data and projections for Hong Kong

# Source: Refer to Xiujuan He Hong Kong base temperatures for heating and cooling degree days (HDD and CDD) are 14.95°C and 20.66°C (not 18.3°C as default). The climate data are from Hong Kong Observatory https://data.gov.hk/tc-data/dataset/hk-hko-rss-daily-temperature-info-hko and using no climate models (const dgree day with no GCM model). The projection is started from 20.
